# terrible_community_general_iso_extract (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `dest` (String) The destination directory to extract files to.
- `files` (String) A list of files to extract from the image. Extracting directories does not work.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `image` (String) The ISO image to extract files from.

### Optional

- `executable` (String) The path to the `7z` executable to use for extracting files from the ISO. If not provided, it assumes the value `7z`.
- `force` (Boolean) If `true`, it replaces the remote file when contents are different than the source. If `false`, the file is only extracted and copied if the destination does not already exist.
- `password` (String) Password used to decrypt files from the ISO. It is only used if `7z` is used. The password is used as a command line argument to 7z. This is a **potential security risk** that allows passwords to be revealed if someone else can list running processes on the same machine in the right moment.
